{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323175125321F3320B71D91325A89"}"},"total":15},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7614215629112902424","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"太好看了，给老子我看爽了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772828648,"group_id":"7601853171853446169","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"遨游于书海之中的旅行者","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+P6zalTiWsNg3DpLU4s+PY=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a9e515c66de64acea7aae3a5bf8bc847~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791110&x-signature=shr0hl6LQwK4dEPj6AExARjeE0c%3D","user_id":"433642889559188","user_name":"梦尘忆往"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"433642889559188","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":3,"fan_ranklist_title":"殿堂粉","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7601853171853446169","book_info":{"abstract":"解道玄是个小道士，穿越以后，他还是个小道士。
小道士命不好，是老道士捡来的，小道士的命更不好了，他发现自己在沧南。
小道士的命很好，他有一个同学叫林七夜，小道士的命更好了，他发现自己能开挂！
小道士逆天了，梦入神机，三皇代理，头顶玄天，陆行人间！
“克苏鲁？什么玩意儿！跟我的老祖宗说去吧！”
“祖宗，你跟他废什么话呀！”
“捡起来！我叫你把刀，捡，起，来！”
